name: cross-fade
title: crossFade
description: A calm opacity cross-fade between two scenes — Onda's house easing (cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1)) and 18-frame duration baked into the recommended timing call. Reads as deliberate, not generic. Wraps Remotion's `fade()` presentation.
pickWhen: the house default when no transition is asked for. Use `morph` for premium feel; `dip-to-color` for the editing-room classic.
